allow: Bash(mkdir -p ~/.local/share/applications && cp /home/kayode-olalere/Codes/rust-projects/obsidian/assets/io.obsidian.desktop ~/.local/share/applications/ && mkdir -p ~/.local/share/icons/hicolor/64x64/apps && cp /home/kayode-olalere/Codes/rust-projects/obsidian/assets/icon_64.png ~/.local/share/icons/hicolor/64x64/apps/io.obsidian.png && gtk4-update-icon-cache ~/.local/share/icons/hicolor/ 2>/dev/null; update-desktop-database ~/.local/share/applications/ 2>/dev/null; echo "done")

Bash(rm -f ~/.local/share/applications/io.obsidian.desktop ~/.local/share/icons/hicolor/64x64/apps/io.obsidian.png && cp /home/kayode-olalere/Codes/rust-projects/obsidian/assets/io.obsidian.terminal.desktop ~/.local/share/applications/ && mkdir -p ~/.local/share/icons/hicolor/64x64/apps && cp /home/kayode-olalere/Codes/rust-projects/obsidian/assets/icon_64.png ~/.local/share/icons/hicolor/64x64/apps/io.obsidian.terminal.png && gtk4-update-icon-cache ~/.local/share/icons/hicolor/ 2>/dev/null; update-desktop-database ~/.local/share/applications/ 2>/dev/null; echo "done")
Bash(echo $PATH | grep -q ".cargo/bin" && echo "already in PATH" || echo "not in PATH")

Bash(ICON_SRC=/home/kayode-olalere/Codes/rust-projects/obsidian/assets/icon.png && convert "$ICON_SRC" -resize 256x256 ~/.local/share/icons/hicolor/256x256/apps/io.obsidian.terminal.png && convert "$ICON_SRC" -resize 128x128 ~/.local/share/icons/hicolor/128x128/apps/io.obsidian.terminal.png && convert "$ICON_SRC" -resize 48x48 ~/.local/share/icons/hicolor/48x48/apps/io.obsidian.terminal.png && echo "icons resized and installed")
Bash(dpkg -l | grep -i imagemagick 2>/dev/null | head -3; which gm 2>/dev/null; python3 -c "from PIL import Image; print\('pillow available'\)" 2>/dev/null || echo "no pillow")

Bash(python3 -c "
from PIL import Image, ImageDraw

src = Image.open\('/home/kayode-olalere/Codes/rust-projects/obsidian/assets/icon.png'\).convert\('RGBA'\)

for size in [256, 128, 64, 48]:
    img = src.resize\(\(size, size\), Image.LANCZOS\)
    r = size // 5
    mask = Image.new\('L', \(size, size\), 0\)
    draw = ImageDraw.Draw\(mask\)
    draw.rounded_rectangle\([0, 0, size - 1, size - 1], radius=r, fill=255\)
    img.putalpha\(mask\)
    img.save\(f'/home/kayode-olalere/.local/share/icons/hicolor/{size}x{size}/apps/io.obsidian.terminal.png'\)

print\('done'\)
")
Bash(bash -n scripts/install.sh && echo "install.sh: OK" && bash -n scripts/uninstall.sh && echo "uninstall.sh: OK" && bash -n scripts/build-release.sh && echo "build-release.sh: OK")
